# Protos Web — llms.txt
# https://protosweb.eu/llms.txt
# Guidance for AI crawlers and language models (GEO).

> Protos Web is a web design and development studio from Zagreb, Croatia,
> founded by Dario Imsirović (full stack 3D cross-web developer / AI engineer)
> and Martina Markulin (frontend & shop UI/UX designer, Instagram: everybodycries).
> Serving Croatia, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, North Macedonia,
> Slovenia, the wider Balkans / ex-Yu region, and the EU.
> Trade registration in progress: Protos Web Mark23 (OIB: 23732814520).

## People (identity)
- Dario Imsirović / Dario Imsirovic / Dario Imširović / ProtosEschatos / protos_eschatos / imsirovicdario23 / dario.imsirovic / imsirovicdarioprotosweb / protoswebmark23
- Martina Markulin / everybodycries / @everybodycries
- Roles: full stack 3D crossweb designer, full stack cross-web developer, AI engineer, shop UI/UX designer
